steps.title: Use a two-point Desmos table
steps.content: The fastest way is to put two clear points from the graph into Desmos. The line crosses the y-axis at $(0,-1)$ and also passes through $(1,-6)$. A linear regression returns slope $-5$ and intercept $-1$.

steps.title: Assemble the equation and test each choice
steps.content: With $m=-5$ and $b=-1$, $f(x)=-5x-1$. Choice A has the wrong slope and wrong intercept. Choice B matches both. Choice C has the right slope but the wrong intercept. Choice D has the wrong slope and wrong intercept. Choice B is correct.
